hooks.command: node -e "const path = process.argv[1]; if (path && (path.includes('package-lock.json') || path.includes('node_modules'))) { console.error('BLOCK: Do not edit lock files or node_modules directly'); process.exit(2); }" "$INPUT_FILE"

node -e "const f = process.argv[1]; if (f && f.includes('src/core')) { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('npx vitest run --reporter=dot', { stdio: 'pipe' }); console.log('Tests passed'); } catch(e) { console.error('Tests FAILED'); process.exit(1); } }" "$INPUT_FILE"
